message:
perf(db): replace three-way JOIN with two-phase sampling in consistency probe

The startup consistency probe previously used a single SELECT with
JOIN across messages, projects, and agents tables, which triggered
FrankenSQLite parity-cert fallback contention on large mailboxes.

Refactored to a two-phase approach: first fetch message envelopes from
the messages table alone, then resolve project slugs and sender names
via batched IN-clause point-lookups. Uses native C SQLite path instead
of FrankenSQLite for this probe to sidestep fallback entirely. Adds
smallvec dependency and HashSet for deduplication of lookup IDs.

Also updates MCP server URL from port 8765 to 8876 across all editor
config files (codex, cursor, gemini) to match the current server bind.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
